headline: SVP, International Operations at Broadsign
summary:
Software Exec with 25+ years of experience ranging from dotcom startups to established international companies.

Have spent the last 20 years focused on the Media & Advertising industry growing a business from 3 employees to 300 employees. Experienced in Operational Efficiency, Client Management, Business Development, Software Development Lifecycle, & Project Management.

experiences.title: Partner, Managing Director, Ayuda EMEA
experiences.description: One of three founding members of the company working closely with CEO and founders. As Managing Director of Ayuda EMEA, responsible for: • P&L responsibility for EMEA region • Providing strategic advice and guidance to CEO • Establishing and maintaining effective formal and informal links with major customers As partner, Involved in strategic planning and initiatives company-wide.

experiences.title: Partner, Managing Director, Ayuda GmbH
experiences.description: One of three founding members of the company working closely with CEO and main founder. As Managing Director of Ayuda GmbH, responsible for: • Recruitment and retention of qualified resources • Preparing corporate and annual business plan • Providing strategic advice and guidance to CEO • Establishing and maintaining effective formal and informal links with major customers • Preparing, managing, and monitoring the annual budget As partner, Involved in strategic planning and initiatives company-wide.

experiences.title: Partner, Senior Vice President, Global Client Services
experiences.description: One of three founding members of the company working closely with CEO and main founder. Manage growing international Client Services team to deliver exceptional quality of service to existing customers as well as develop new customers. As partner, Involved in strategic planning and initiatives.

experiences.title: Vice President, Client Services
experiences.description: One of three founding members of the company working closely with CEO and main founder. Currently focusing on delivering exceptional quality of service to existing customers as well as developing new customers.

experiences.title: Director of Products
experiences.description: One of three founding members of the company working closely with CEO and main founder.  Wide range of responsibilities including product management and direction, sales and technical services, customer care, and R&D management. Main focus is running day-to-day development operations and ensuring that products are shipped efficiently and on time.

experiences.title: Senior Consultant
experiences.description: Worked as senior consultant for the Western Region Professional Services Organization.  Assisted BOBJ clients with integrations, customizations, feature development, and deployments. Received MVP award for Consulting Services twice in two years; also awarded Customer Care award for Professional Services.

experiences.title: Team Lead - Java Development
experiences.description: Led a team of 4 Java developers working on developing an online store infrastructure.  Included merchant services such as credit card processing, inventory management, shipment processing and revenue management and reporting.

experiences.title: Solution Architect
experiences.description: Developed packaged BI applications for the Telco, Financial, and Manufacturing industries as part of the Visionyze.com initiative.

experiences.title: Consultant
experiences.description: Provided consulting services to enterprise customers on Business Intelligence platforms such as Media 3.x and Esperant 4.x.  Focused on delivering total solutions including Relational Reporting, OLAP, Data Warehousing, and ETL.

experiences.title: Customer Support Rep
experiences.description: Provided customer support for the Business Intelligence division on products such as Easy Reporter, Media, and Esperant.  Worked with various platforms, including HP3000/MPE, HP9000/HP-UX, RS6000/AIX, Sun/Solaris, and Windows 95/NT.

education.activities_and_societies: Activities and Societies: Member of the Garnet Key Society.  DJ at CFLI - Radio Loyola.
Activities and Societies: Student Council Representative - Social Activities

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Microsoft 2012 IMPACT Award Winner - Windows Azure Application - Partner of the Year
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: By developing a new generation of technology on the Windows Azure Platform, server management and administrative costs were offloaded from the customer. This allowed Ayuda Media Systems to tap into an entirely new market: small enterprises.

accomplishment_patents.title: Out of Home Digital Ad Server
accomplishment_patents.description: There is provided a method for an out of home advertising campaign, the method comprising: supplying creative for the campaign; determining criteria for the campaign, the criteria comprising targeting a demographic; selecting one or more boards for display of the creative, the selecting based on static data, projected data, and optionally real-time data; and displaying the creative on the one or more boards. There is also provided an out of home digital ad server comprising: at least one digital board; a digital feed provider to provide each board with creative to be displayed; a computer processor for analysing data to optimize board selection based on a demographic; and a communication network to direct creative from the ad serving processor to the at least one digital board based on the selection of creative by the computer processor. Weniger anzeigen

accomplishment_patents.title: Methods, Apparatuses and Systems for Calculating an Amount to be Billed in Respect of Running an Out-of- Home Advertisement During a Period of Time
Pay per look billing method and system for out-of-home advertisement
accomplishment_patents.description: Methods, apparatuses and systems for calculating an amount to be billed in respect of running an out-of-home advertisement during a period of time.
